title: Whimscape x RPG Series
description: The RPG Series mods in the style of Whimscape.
body: A WIP resource pack in the style of [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) for the RPG Series mods. This resource pack currently retextures the [Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards), [Archers](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers), [Paladins & Priests](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests) and [Rogues & Warriors](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors) mods.
